vehicle.variant: Passive Key / Phone As A Key

vehicle_information.transponder_type: Build-dependent — identify the original transponder before key generation
vehicle_information.frequency_mhz: Market/build dependent — confirm from original remote label or frequency test
vehicle_information.notes: EV-specific connected security. Verify physical key provision, Phone As A Key, online/FDRS and account requirements by build and operation.

programming.add_key: Use the supported Ford KVM/BCM OBD immobiliser menu. Platform security access and an internet connection may be tool-dependent.
programming.all_keys_lost: Use the supported KVM/BCM AKL route by OBD where covered. Later platforms may need online calculation, server access or a platform-specific cable.
programming.route: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
programming.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.
programming.verification_note: Confirm exact year, ignition type, module generation and current tool menu before programming. Record-specific verified information takes priority over this baseline.

oem_part_numbers: VIN-specific or superseded reference — confirm from original key/VIN before ordering
vehicle_information.button_count: Varies by original remote and trim configuration — confirm physical key
vehicle_information.battery_type: Varies by remote shell/version — confirm battery fitted to physical key

key_information.transponder_type: Build-dependent — identify the original transponder before key generation
key_information.frequency_mhz: Market/build dependent — confirm from original remote label or frequency test
key_information.battery: Varies by remote shell/version — confirm battery fitted to physical key
key_information.buttons: Varies by original remote and trim configuration — confirm physical key
oem_part_numbers: VIN-specific or superseded reference — confirm from original key/VIN before ordering

add_key.method: Use the supported Ford KVM/BCM OBD immobiliser menu. Platform security access and an internet connection may be tool-dependent.
add_key.programming_method: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
add_key.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.

all_keys_lost.method: Use the supported KVM/BCM AKL route by OBD where covered. Later platforms may need online calculation, server access or a platform-specific cable.
all_keys_lost.programming_method: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
all_keys_lost.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.

operations.programming_route: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
operations.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.

security.programming_route: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
security.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.
security.fdrs_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.
security.transponder_family: Build-dependent — identify the original transponder before key generation

tools.Important: Programming coverage varies by exact year, ignition type and current tool software. Generation tools do not automatically mean Add Key or AKL support.
tools.programming_route: OBD programming through the KVM/BCM; confirm platform, CAN/CAN-FD connection and current tool coverage before starting.
tools.online_requirement: Tool/platform dependent; some routes are offline, while later Ford security functions may require internet or FDRS.

notes.job_notes: EV-specific connected security. Verify physical key provision, Phone As A Key, online/FDRS and account requirements by build and operation. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.
notes.programming_baseline: Programming fields marked as UK baseline guidance must be checked against the exact vehicle and current tool coverage.

vehicle_information.immobiliser_system: Ford PATS / shared-platform system as applicable
vehicle_information.tool_or_cable_required: Ford security access/bypass as required by build
vehicle_information.notes: Electric vehicle diagnostic setup. Program via high-end diagnostic tools or FDRS.

tools.Connection / cable: Ford security access/bypass as required by build
tools.Battery support: Use a regulated vehicle support supply during immobiliser programming
tools.connection_or_adapter: Ford security access/bypass as required by build
